description_long: This barn features a large, rectangular main structure with a prominent gable roof clad in dark brown panels, complemented by a slightly lower, attached side section with a lighter, metallic gable roof. The main roof is punctuated by several small cupolas or vents, adding to its agricultural character. The front facade of the barn displays a wide, triangular gable end with a covered porch or overhang supported by posts, suggesting a sheltered entryway. The exterior siding appears to be smooth and unadorned, likely metal or wood panels, with minimal visible ornamentation. There are no visible windows or doors on the main facades, giving the barn a utilitarian and secure appearance. The overall form and roofline evoke the style of a traditional American barn, suitable for storage or agricultural use in a rural or peri-urban setting.
description: A large, rectangular barn with a dark brown gable roof, attached side section with a lighter roof, and a wide, sheltered front entry. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with small roof cupolas and no visible windows.
description_view_0: The barn is seen from the side, showing the intersection of the main dark brown gable roof and the lighter side roof, with the front gable partially visible.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the full length of the dark brown gable roof and the smaller, lighter roof section, with cupolas visible along the ridge.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the rear gable end of the main barn and the side extension, emphasizing the roof shapes and lack of visible openings.
description_view_3: The front view displays the wide, triangular gable end with a covered porch or overhang, supported by posts, and the lighter roofed side section extending forward.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with attached side gable extension and multiple cupolas
attribute_siding_pattern: smooth vertical or horizontal metal or wood panels
attribute_door_style: single large hinged or sliding barn door under the front overhang, not fully visible
attribute_window_arrangement: no visible windows on any facade
